name: SVG Mask Effect
description: A mask reveal effect, hover the cursor over a container to reveal what's underneath.
animation_description: SVG-based mask reveals content underneath with animated mask shape changes. Cursor position or scroll controls the mask reveal area.
code_snippet:
<svg
  width="1298"
  height="1298"
  viewBox="0 0 1298 1298"
  fill="none"
  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
>
  <circle cx="649" cy="649" r="649" fill="black" />
</svg>CopySelect Language
